All 48 tests pass. Here's a summary of the 5 bugs fixed:

| # | File | Bug | Fix |
|---|------|-----|-----|
| 1 | `tokenizer.py` | String token values included surrounding quotes (root cause of 5+ evaluator failures) | Strip outer quotes: `line[start+1:col-1]` |
| 2 | `tokenizer.py` | Escape sequences not processed in string values | Process char-by-char: `\n`→newline, `\\`→`\`, `\"`/`\'`→removed |
